title: thelymitra occidentalis
intro: Thelymitra occidentalis, also known as the Western Sun Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds that may help to combat infections and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Thelymitra occidentalis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
